title: Governed FDA first-generic structured-source correction amendment
researchQuestion: Can information available at a drug-state-quarter observation predict next-quarter generic entry and, under stated observational assumptions, what is the estimated ATT risk difference of high lagged eligible-neighbor adoption exposure on next-quarter entry?
population: Eligible FDA first-generic approval proxy x scientifically eligible state x observable Medicaid quarter
drugIdentityPolicy: authoritative-product-family-v1.2: preserve one official HTML approval event per year/sequence/ANDA and separate strength-specific Drugs@FDA/Orange Book product children; prior converted rows remain immutable historical evidence and are superseded for cohort construction
stateEligibilityPolicy: state-eligibility-v1; eligibility is versioned and distinct from data completeness
territoryPolicy: territories are not rejected by name; eligibility follows the versioned state/territory reference policy
entryDefinition: any-positive-v1: first eligible quarter with observed positive utilization; missing and suppressed are not zero

distributionDefinitions.weightedDistribution: 100 * frozen pre-outcome baseline weight among active states / total eligible baseline weight

predictive.observationTime: end of observation quarter using only information available by that cutoff
predictive.split: TemporalGroupedHoldout by FDA approval date with whole GenericLaunchId groups: training 2021-01-01 through 2022-12-31; validation 2023-01-01 through 2023-12-31; locked test 2024-01-01 through 2024-12-31; no GenericLaunchId overlap among partitions
predictive.testPolicy: 2024-01-01 through 2024-12-31 FDA approval cohorts with complete outcome-specific follow-up; locked from selection and evaluated once after model selection

causal.treatment: HighNeighborAdoptionExposure; prior-quarter eligible-neighbor adoption share; threshold 0.50; minimum eligible-peer count 2; lag 1 quarter; neighbor-v1; the primary minimum cannot change based on outcome results
causal.timeZero: observation-quarter start; baseline covariates available no later than treatment measurement
causal.adjustmentSet: peer-exposure-adjustment-v1; pretreatment leakage-safe declared confounders only
causal.positivity: empirical common support; propensity clipping [0.02,0.98] is sensitivity-only; report effective sample size and extreme weights

authoritativeIdentitySources: Frozen official FDA first-generic HTML tables
mappingHierarchy: Exact ANDA to Drugs@FDA and Orange Book

dataPolicies.missing: explicit missingness; training-only fitted replacement where applicable
dataPolicies.suppression: unknown-not-zero; prescription and reimbursement remain null
dataPolicies.censoring: only observations with outcome-specific required follow-up are included; incomplete outcomes remain censored/null

protocolDeviationPolicy: No outcome-driven change; material deviations require a new version and approval.
humanApproval: Approved by Tanvir Mahmud Khan for structured FDA HTML correction, exact ANDA enrichment, supersession audit, and corrected feasibility only; no final mappings, finalization, training, causal estimation, or Milestone 10.
